title: MCPSX
description: Minecraft if it were on the PS1 (No horror mods, no backstory, just a modpack)
body:
![MCLPSX](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/10d8c5b9-c10e-406b-a3b5-46b02cd23701)
# Minecraft Legacy PSX, Minecraft if it were on the PS1

Features include:
- PS1 style graphics
- Alpha Minecraft feel
- Beta 1.7.3 World Gen (Can be changed to Infdev in the settings)
- All the Features that are in my modpack; Alpha Relived
- Bitcrushed Audio (Because hifi HD audio probably cannot be on the ps1)
- World size limiting to 2000 blocks to ""Save On Storage"" (the PS1 did not have alot of storage obviously via memory cards)
- And more!!

Find this modpack and some other modpacks that I haven't uploaded here yet on GitHub: [https://github.com/arc360alt/arcsmodpacks/tree/main/MCPSX](https://github.com/arc360alt/arcsmodpacks/tree/main/MCPSX)
